scripts.sync:syncpoint: node scripts/apply-syncpoint-branding.mjs sITO && cp -r sITO/* public/syncpoint/ && node scripts/apply-syncpoint-branding.mjs public/syncpoint
scripts.sync:polly: rm -rf public/marcelloguida-polly && cp -r marcelloguida-polly public/marcelloguida-polly && node scripts/apply-polly-paths.mjs public/marcelloguida-polly
scripts.dev: npm run sync:syncpoint && npm run sync:polly && vite
scripts.build: npm run sync:syncpoint && npm run sync:polly && vite build
